overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in a white lab coat exploring a dimly lit Soviet-era institutional facility. The character ascends stairs, walks through corridors with blue-painted walls, observes a room through a security window, encounters a uniformed guard, and explores a reception lobby before approaching a restricted door.

events.description: finishes ascending stairs and begins walking along corridor

agents.ego_description: walking up staircase and continuing through narrow corridor with blue walls

entered.detail: red painted metal handrail along the staircase
blue and white painted concrete block walls
simple wooden table against the right wall
tan metal storage lockers along the left wall

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a staircase with red railings and enters a narrow institutional corridor with blue and white walls. The camera follows as the character walks past a wooden table and approaches a set of metal lockers, with fluorescent ceiling lights illuminating the space.

events.description: character stops to look through security window at person in adjacent room
encounters guard in olive uniform walking in opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking past security windows, pausing to observe through window at a person working, then continuing and passing a guard

notable_agents.action: person sitting at desk visible through security window
guard in olive uniform walking down corridor toward camera

entered.detail: windows with metal grilles and blinds looking into adjacent rooms
stack of wooden crates and boxes in the corner

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a corridor lined with security windows featuring metal grilles, pausing to look through at a person working in an adjacent room. After turning a corner, the character passes a guard in an olive uniform walking in the opposite direction, with wooden crates visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: reception lobby with desk and waiting area

events.description: exits narrow corridor and enters large open lobby with reception desk
approaches large wooden door and stops to read the sign

agents.ego_description: walking through spacious lobby examining the reception area, framed photos, and approaching a restricted door

entered.detail: large wooden reception desk with lamp and papers
large black and white framed photographs on the wall
red leather armchairs arranged against the wall
double wooden doors with wall-mounted lights and a posted sign

segments.scene_description: The character enters a spacious reception lobby from the narrow corridor, revealing a large wooden desk, framed historical photographs, and red leather seating. The character walks across the carpeted floor toward an imposing wooden door with wall sconces, stopping to examine a sign posted on it.

scene_state.functional_zone: returning through reception area to corridor

events.description: turns around and begins walking back toward the corridor exit
passes guard standing near the reception desk

agents.ego_description: turning away from the restricted door and walking back through the lobby past the guard to exit the area

notable_agents.action: guard standing near the reception desk

segments.scene_description: After examining the door, the character turns around and walks back through the lobby. The character passes a guard standing near the reception desk and heads toward the corridor exit, with the reception desk now visible on the right side as the camera turns.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sterile institutional facility that transitions from narrow, utilitarian corridors into a grand reception lobby. It begins as the character ascends a staircase with red railings and enters a cramped hallway of blue and white walls, passing a wooden table and metal lockers under fluorescent lighting. As the character moves forward, the space shifts into a security zone lined with grilled windows and olive-uniformed guards before the narrow passage opens up into a spacious reception lobby. The scene expands to reveal a large wooden desk, framed photographs, and red leather seating, leading the character toward an imposing wooden door with wall sconces. Finally, the camera pivots as the character turns away from the door, retracing their steps past the reception desk and back toward the corridor exit.
